title: DUII MODULE - 211info
text: INNER JOURNEY SCAPPOOSE DUII MODULE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to mandatory courses that individuals who have been found guilty of Driving Under the Influence (DUII) or Driving While Intoxicated (DWI) must take in order to regain their driver's license. 51579 COLUMBIA RIVER highway Suite G Scappoose, OR 97056 Eligibility: Individuals who have been convicted of DUII or DWI. Referral from Oregon State Evaluation Service provider is required. Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 543-6100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 543-6100 Intake (971) 777-0756 Assessment Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies. Sliding-scale fees are available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: By appointment only Wednesday noon-5pm Services: DUI Offender Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. INNER JOURNEY SCAPPOOSE
